expectations.evidence: Response contains 'ConfigDict(strict=True, frozen=True, extra="forbid")' in all three model classes
Response contains 'frozen=True' in ConfigDict for all three model classes

expectations.text: Chooses Pydantic for config parsing (external file = trust boundary)
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly states 'Config files are a trust boundary (external input you don't control), so Pydantic is the right call here'

expectations.text: Does NOT overengineer — keeps models minimal for the actual config shape
